name: request-dispatcher
description: Routes ambiguous user requests to the correct Forge Skill
intent: Analyze ambiguous or cross-cutting user requests against project state and available Skills, recommend the best match — the first interaction point for unclear intents
author: ReqForge

when: User request is ambiguous and no single Skill clearly matches

commands.name: request-dispatcher
commands.description: Analyze intent and project state, recommend target Skill
